# CASE: nex-case-021-pos-connection-hardening

## Problem

`GET /pos` returned a raw 500 `QueryException` when the `pos` connection used `krypton_readonly` with an empty password (`using password: NO`). Host `192.168.100.7:3308` (dev LAN mirror).

## Root Cause

`PosConnectionService::applyFromDatabase()` applies host/database/username from `system_settings` but `hasPosConnection()` does not require `pos.password`. Missing password resolves to `''`, producing MySQL 1045 access denied. `PosController` had no structured pre-flight guard.

## Specialist Investigation & Implementation

- Added `PosConnectionService::posStatus()`, `isReachable()`, and `failureFromThrowable()` with statuses: `connected`, `not_configured`, `auth_failed`, `unreachable`. Uses Laravel `once()` for per-request memoization.
- `applyFromDatabase()` now logs a warning when host/db/username are set but password is empty.
- `hasPasswordConfigured()` skips password check for sqlite test driver; checks encrypted `system_settings` or `database.connections.pos.password`.
- `PosController@index` calls `posStatus()` before queries; renders empty POS page with `posConnected`, `posStatus`, `posMessage` on failure. JSON endpoints return 503 with `status` + friendly `message`.
- `POS/Index.vue` banner title varies by `posStatus`; link to `pos-connection.index`.
- Tests: `PosControllerConnectivityTest` — unreachable (200 + banner props), empty password (`not_configured`), JSON 503 with `status`.

## Code Simplification

`code-simplifier` on `POS/Index.vue`: removed redundant `currentSession` computed wrapper and stale comment; direct `props.currentSession` usage. PHP files SKIPPED — no simplifications identified.

## Files Changed

| File | Change |
| ---- | ------ |
| `woosoo-nexus/app/Services/PosConnectionService.php` | `posStatus()`, diagnostics, empty-password warning |
| `woosoo-nexus/app/Http/Controllers/Admin/PosController.php` | Pre-flight guard, disconnected page helper, JSON 503 with status |
| `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/pages/POS/Index.vue` | Status-aware banner |
| `woosoo-nexus/tests/Feature/Admin/PosControllerConnectivityTest.php` | Connectivity regression tests |

## Operator follow-up (Part A — not code)

1. Open **Configuration → POS Connection** and save the correct `krypton_readonly` password (encrypted in `system_settings`).
2. Confirm MySQL grant allows the app host (`DESKTOP-VQJRR8K` or `%`).
3. Confirm write operations: username is `krypton_readonly` — read-only grants fix page load but may still fail `addOrder`/`payOrder` writes.

## Verification

```
php artisan test --filter=PosControllerConnectivity
# PASS — 4 tests, 41 assertions (2026-06-09)
```

Pending: `scripts/pre-merge-check.ps1 -App woosoo-nexus` (Verifier gate).

## Rollback

Revert the four files above; password change is reversible via POS Connection settings UI.
